setup.title: Just you, or a team?
setup.subtitle: Pick what fits. You can change this any time.
setup.error.pick_mode: Please pick one of the options above to continue.
setup.solo.title: Just me
setup.solo.desc: Set up on this computer and start right away. Nothing to share.
setup.host.title: Me + my team
setup.host.desc: I'll keep Jowork running here, and others on my Wi-Fi can join in.
setup.host.step_desc: Send any of these to your teammates. They'll paste it into Jowork to connect — as long as you're on the same Wi-Fi.
setup.host.info: Teammates: open Jowork → choose "Someone set it up for me" → paste the link.
setup.host.info_html: Teammates: open Jowork → choose "Someone set it up for me" → paste the link.
setup.host.ip_none: Could not detect your IP. Share the URL manually.
setup.join.title: Someone set it up for me
setup.join.desc: My teammate already has Jowork running. I just want to connect.
setup.join.step_desc: We're looking on your Wi-Fi right now. Tap to connect when you see it.
setup.join.not_found: Nothing found nearby. Ask your teammate for the link and paste it below.
setup.join.divider: or paste the link your teammate sent you
setup.join.label: Link from your teammate
setup.join.error.empty: Please select one above, or paste the link your teammate sent you.
setup.join.error.invalid: That doesn't look right. The link should start with http://
chat.greeting: Hi, how can I help you?
chat.greeting_sub: I can search your data sources (Lark docs, GitLab code, Linear tasks, PostHog data, etc.) to answer your questions.
chat.send_hint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.workstyle_hint: Use Markdown to describe your work style, communication preferences, and focus areas. The AI assistant will reference this document to tailor its responses.
logs.title: My Activity Logs
logs.subtitle: View your conversation history, tool call records, and error logs
logs.col.title: Title
logs.chart.title: Token / Day
billing.title: Subscription & Plans
billing.subtitle: Manage your JoWork subscription
files.empty_text: Click an .html or .md file to preview
files.empty_sub: Select a file and press Space for Quick Look
aiservices.title: ⚡ AI Services
aiservices.subtitle: Manage local AI model services
ob.step1.title: Connect your tools
ob.step1.sub: Jowork learns from your data. Connect the tools you use daily — you can always add more later.
ob.step2.sub: Jowork needs an AI model to think and act. Bring your own key for full control, or use ours.
ob.byok.title: Bring your own API key
ob.byok.desc: Use your Anthropic, OpenAI, or Gemini key. You control costs and data. No account needed.
ob.hosted.title: Use Jowork hosted models
ob.hosted.desc: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini — all in one place with credits. Requires a jowork.work account.
ob.step3.sub: A few sentences about how you work helps the AI give better, more relevant answers from day one.
ob.step3.placeholder: e.g. I'm a backend engineer at a 5-person startup. I care about clean code and fast iteration. I prefer bullet points over long paragraphs. I usually check Slack and Linear first thing in the morning.
ob.done.title: You're all set
ob.done.sub: Jowork is ready. Your AI coworker is warming up in the background.
ob.err.api_key: Please enter at least one API key, or skip this step.
ob.err.save_failed: Failed to save. Please try again.
ob.err.style_failed: Failed to save. You can add this later in Settings.
appsettings.title: App Settings
appsettings.saas.name: Jowork Cloud
appsettings.saas.desc: Connect to jowork.work. Zero setup required.
appsettings.selfhosted.name: Self-hosted
appsettings.selfhosted.desc: Run your own Jowork server. Your data stays on your machine.
appsettings.selfhosted.info: The app will start a local server on your machine. You can configure connectors and invite teammates in Self-hosted mode.
appsettings.saved: Mode saved. Restart the app to apply changes.
appsettings.err.desktop_only: This settings page must be opened from the desktop app.
